description: ablation D (D-failure schedule) — Opus 4.6 variant: reasoning=adaptive, reflection=none, scenario=2strike-recovery (D fails games 1, 2 then reliable). Intermediate cell between 1-strike (0/2 scar under CATAS) and 3-strike (1/1 scar under CATAS). Locates the threshold for relational-lesson dominance over procedural anti-scar bias. Direct comparators: main_claude_opus_recovery (1-strike, n=4), ablation_d_schedule_opus_adaptive_norefl_3strike (3-strike, n=1).

reasoning_effort_config._comment: Adaptive mode for LLM agents (matches main_claude_opus_recovery). The ONLY difference from main panel cell is dummy.D.correctness_list: 2 strikes [F,F,T,...] instead of 1 strike [F,T,T,...]. Reflection stays off (norefl arm).

D._comment: 2-strike schedule: D gives wrong answer in games 1, 2, then reliable for games 3-11.
